simplesect.para: True if transformations are not equal

briefdescription.para: Check if the transformation is defined.

simplesect.para: True if the transformation is defined

briefdescription.para: Check if the transformation is the identity.

simplesect.para: True if the transformation is the identity

briefdescription.para: Returns true if transformation is rigid.

para.verbatim: A rigid transformation preserves distances and angles. It is either a translation, a rotation, or a reflection.

briefdescription.para: Get the type of the transformation.
Apply the transformation to a point.
Apply the transformation to a 2D vector.
Apply the transformation to a 2D object.

parameterdescription.para: A unique pointer to a 2D object

briefdescription.para: Construct a rotation transformation around a given point.

simplesect.para: A rotation transformation around the given point

briefdescription.para: Get a string from a transformation type.

simplesect.para: The string name of the type

briefdescription.para: Determine the transformation type from a matrix.

detaileddescription.para: Represents a 2D affine transformation using a 3x3 homogeneous matrix. Supports translation, rotation, scaling, reflection, shear, and their compositions.
